label: rag_from_public_fixture_retrieval
source_note: Synthetic public fixtures, not book manuscript text.
question: RTX 4080でRAGの回答生成を動かすなら、OllamaとvLLMをどう使い分けるべき？

retrieved.heading: Synthetic local LLM notes for public RAG reproduction
retrieved.text_preview: vLLM is better treated as a fixed API server. It exposes an OpenAI-compatible API and is useful when a RAG service or multiple agents need to send repeated requests to the same model.

retrieved.heading: Synthetic local LLM notes for public RAG reproduction
retrieved.text_preview: On a 16GB GPU, model size is not the only constraint. vLLM can reserve substantial VRAM for KV cache, so context length and concurrency settings must be checked.

retrieved.heading: Synthetic local LLM notes for public RAG reproduction
retrieved.text_preview: These notes are synthetic fixtures for the public experiment repository. They are not copied from the book manuscript.

retrieved.heading: Synthetic task routing notes
retrieved.text_preview: For code patch suggestions, a code-oriented local model can respond quickly, but the output still needs human review. Fast code generation can also produce over-engineered or incorrect patches.
